item.text: {"results":[{"case":"running","answer":"RUNNING","taskIds":["T-ALPHA","T-ZETA"],"evidence":"Both have newest in-window status \"running\"."},{"case":"attention","answer":"NEEDS_INPUT","taskIds":["T-BETA"],"evidence":"Pending question: Should annual plans keep the existing 15% discount or move to 20%?"},{"case":"atlas","answer":"ATLAS_FAILED","taskIds":["T-ATLAS"],"evidence":"Production signing certificate expired; evidence token: sigcert-4Q9."},{"case":"beacon","answer":"BEACON_COMPLETE","taskIds":["T-BEACON"],"evidence":"Newest in-window message says dashboard implementation is complete and focused tests pass."},{"case":"old-task","answer":"NEEDS_LOOKUP","taskIds":["T-LEGACY"],"evidence":"Legacy cleanup's newest update is outside the preceding 24-hour window."},{"case":"ambiguous","answer":"CLARIFY","taskIds":["T-ATLAS","T-ZETA"],"evidence":"\"the migration\" can refer to Atlas migration or Mobile database migration."}]}
